2024-08-26T16:23:00.CONTENT_CN: 較早前因交通意外而於羗山道近深屈道實施的單線雙程行車措施現已取消。

2024-08-26T15:39:00.CONTENT_EN: Part of the lanes of Tsing Kwai Highway (Airport bound) near Princess Margaret Hospital which was closed due to traffic accident is re-opened to all traffic.
2024-08-26T15:39:00.CONTENT_CN: 較早前因交通意外而封閉的青葵公路(往機場方向)近瑪嘉烈醫院的部份行車線現已解封。

2024-08-26T15:56:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to traffic accident , part of the lanes of Waterloo Road (Tsim Sha Tsui bound) near Maryknoll Convent School is closed to all traffic. Only remaining lanes are available to motorists. Traffic is busy now.
2024-08-26T15:56:00.CONTENT_CN: 因交通意外，窩打老道(往尖沙咀方向)近瑪利諾修院學校的部份行車線現已封閉。 駕駛人士只可使用餘下行車線行車。 現時上址交通繁忙。

2024-08-26T16:29:00.CONTENT_EN: Part of the lanes of Waterloo Road (Tsim Sha Tsui bound) near Maryknoll Convent School which was closed due to traffic accident is re-opened to all traffic. Traffic queue takes time to disperse.
2024-08-26T16:29:00.CONTENT_CN: 較早前因交通意外而封閉的窩打老道(往尖沙咀方向)近瑪利諾修院學校的部份行車線現已解封。 車龍有待消散。

2024-08-26T16:10:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to traffic accident , part of the lanes of Yuen Long Highway (Yuen Long bound) near Shun Tat Street is still being closed to all traffic. Only remaining lanes are available to motorists. Traffic queue on Yuen Long Highway (Yuen Long bound) ends at Tuen Mun Road near Siu Hong. Traffic is congested now.
2024-08-26T16:10:00.CONTENT_CN: 因交通意外，元朗公路(往元朗方向)近順達街的部份行車線仍然封閉。 駕駛人士只可使用餘下行車線行車。 現時在元朗公路(往元朗方向)的車龍龍尾已到屯門公路近兆康。 現時上址交通擠塞。

2024-08-26T16:21:00.CONTENT_EN: Part of the lanes of Yuen Long Highway (Yuen Long bound) near Shun Tat Street which was closed due to traffic accident is re-opened to all traffic. Traffic queue takes time to disperse.
2024-08-26T16:21:00.CONTENT_CN: 較早前因交通意外而封閉的元朗公路(往元朗方向)近順達街的部份行車線現已解封。 車龍有待消散。

description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_EN: San Tin Highway and Fanling Highway, Both bounds, near San Tin Interchange
description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_CN: 新田公路及粉嶺公路，來回方向，近新田交匯處

2024-08-26T16:40:00.CONTENT_EN: To facilitate the works of Development of Lok Ma Chau Loop, from 11.00 p. m. on 26 August 2024 (Monday) to 4.00 a. m. of the following day, the San Tin Highway and Fanling Highway (both bounds) near San Tin Interchange will be fully closed to all vehicular traffic. Affected vehicles are advised to travel via Castle Peak Road or San Tin Interchange
2024-08-26T16:40:00.CONTENT_CN: 因配合落馬洲河套地區發展工程，新田公路及粉嶺公路(來回方向)將於2024年8月26日(星期一)晚上11時至翌日凌晨4時全線封閉。駕駛人士須改經青山公路或新田交匯處。

2024-08-26T16:58:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to watermain emergency works , the slow lane of San Lau Street (Ko Shan Road bound) near Chatham Road North is closed to all traffic. The slow lane of Chatham Road North (Kwun Tong bound) near San Lau Street is also closed. Only remaining lanes are available to motorists.
2024-08-26T16:58:00.CONTENT_CN: 因水管緊急維修，新柳街(往高山道方向)近漆咸道北的慢線現已封閉。 漆咸道北(往觀塘方向)近新柳街的慢線亦已封閉。 駕駛人士只可使用餘下行車線行車。

2024-08-26T17:52:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to traffic accident , part of the lanes of Wong Chu Road (Tuen Mun Road bound) near On Ting Estate is closed to all traffic. Only remaining lane is available to motorists. Traffic queue on Wong Chu Road (Tuen Mun Road bound) ends at Lung Fu Road near Lung Mun Oasis. Traffic is congested now.
2024-08-26T17:52:00.CONTENT_CN: 因交通意外，皇珠路(往屯門公路方向)近安定邨的部份行車線現已封閉。 駕駛人士只可使用餘下行車線行車。 現時在皇珠路(往屯門公路方向)的車龍龍尾已到龍富路近龍門居。 現時上址交通擠塞。
